feed.title: bbcnews TikTok
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from bbcnews

entry.title: There are strict rules in the UK for adverts promoting low-calorie diets.#KatiePrice#Dieting#Diet#Health#HealthyEating#Nutrition#AdvertisingStandardsAuthority#ASA#BBCNews

entry.title: He was convicted of taking images of a total of 15 women from social media and uploading to porn websites. #DeepFakes #Cambridge #AI #BBCNews
entry.content: He was convicted of taking images of a total of 15 women from social media and uploading to porn websites. #DeepFakes #Cambridge #AI #BBCNews

entry.title: The Nigerian music star who just finished an East African tour said the fake report was ‘extremely irresponsible’. #Davido #Tour #Nigeria #Afrobeat #Afrobeats #PrivateJet #K24TV #Kenya #EastAfrica #BBCNews

entry.title: "I've been offered tons of trans roles, and I just don't want to do it.” #HunterSchafer #Euphoria #Transgender #Trans #FilmTok #HBO #GQ #Jules #MovieTok #TV #TVTok #News #BBCNews

entry.title: The Teaching Regulation Agency's panel found that "there is a real risk of Ms Morris repeating her offending behaviour" and noted she was "deliberate and sustained". #DeputyHead#Teacher#Teaching#Safeguard#Wigan#BBCNews
entry.content: The Teaching Regulation Agency's panel found that "there is a real risk of Ms Morris repeating her offending behaviour" and noted she was "deliberate and sustained". #DeputyHead#Teacher#Teaching#Safeguard#Wigan#BBCNews

entry.title: TT: Do you think companies should be able to use artists’ voices to make AI music? #AI #AIMusic #ArtificialIntelligence #BillieEilish #NickiMinaj #KimPetras #SamSmith #BobMarley #KatyPerry #ArtistsRightAlliance #MusicTok #TikTokMusic #MusicTikTok #Music

entry.title: Don’t count your chickens just yet… any proposed changes wouldn’t come into effect until 2033. #AnimalWelfare #Chickens #FreeRange #Organic#Farming #Scotland #ScottishGovernment #BBCNews
entry.content: Don’t count your chickens just yet… any proposed changes wouldn’t come into effect until 2033. #AnimalWelfare #Chickens #FreeRange #Organic#Farming #Scotland #ScottishGovernment #BBCNews

entry.title: Staff were worried that a window nearby might break and injure the babies during the 7.4 magnitude earthquake. #Taiwan #Earthquake #TaiwanEarthquake #Taipei #Hospital #Maternity #MaternityWard #Babies #Aftershocks #News #BBCNews
entry.content: Staff were worried that a window nearby might break and injure the babies during the 7.4 magnitude earthquake. #Taiwan #Earthquake #TaiwanEarthquake #Taipei #Hospital #Maternity #MaternityWard #Babies #Aftershocks #News #BBCNews
